ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "published_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "published_month" INTEGER /* Month of publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue of the journal */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "ref_count" INTEGER /* Number of references in the publication */,
  "covidence_number" TEXT /* Covidence number for the publication */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the study associated with the publication */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the publication */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of revision */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., 'published', 'in-review', 'rejected') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the author */,
  "google_scholar_id" TEXT /* Google Scholar ID of the author */,
  "research_gate_id" TEXT /* ResearchGate ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-author relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order_of_authorship" INTEGER /* Order of authorship (e.g., first author, second author) */,
  "author_affiliation" TEXT /* Author's affiliation during the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "dept_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "dept_head_email" TEXT /* Email of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "journal_type" TEXT /* Type of the journal (e.g., 'scientific', 'trade', 'conference') */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Whether the journal is open-access or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_journals" (
  "pub_journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-journal relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication in the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journals_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journals_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., 'accepted', 'rejected', 'revision required') */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., 'peer review', 'editorial review') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the reviewer belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "cited_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "citing_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication citing the work */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., 'direct', 'indirect') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the publication */,
  "read_count" INTEGER /* Number of reads or views of the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the publication */,
  "h_index" REAL /* h-index of the publication */,
  "g_index" REAL /* g-index of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "collab_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  "collab_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., 'institutional', 'international') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_collaborations" (
  "pub_collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-collaboration relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaboration */,
  "collab_role" TEXT /* Role of the publication in the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_collaborations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_collaborations_collab_id FOREIGN KEY ("collab_id") REFERENCES collaborations ("collab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'researcher', 'admin', 'department head') */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., 'internal', 'external') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'download') */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher receiving the award */,
  "award_amount" REAL /* Amount of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "grant_name" TEXT /* Name of the grant */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date the grant was received */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher receiving the grant */,
  "grant_amount" REAL /* Amount of the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)
